name: Research with AI, Cambium Academy Course 03
description: Completed the full learning path of Cambium Academy Course 03: the lecture, all 24 flashcards, all three hands-on AI Lab games, and a 20-question quiz passed at 70% or better. Approximately 3 instructional hours. July 2026 curriculum snapshot with public sources.

criteria.narrative: Read or watch the full lecture; clear all 24 flashcards (flip required before marking); win the Citation Hunt, Lateral Race, and Receipts-or-Vibes games in the AI Lab; then pass the 20-question quiz at 70% or better. The quiz stays locked until every prior step is complete. Certificates are issued once per quiz pass and carry a verification ID and QR.
